'''竏喇-ch-z-f''' ('''kahachzefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:follow|follow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-z-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:follow|follow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-ch-z-f
|-
! Lemma
| kahachzefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihachzefoko|thihachzefoko]] || [[word:jihachzefoko|jihachzefoko]] || [[word:shihachzefoko|shihachzefoko]] || [[word:kihachzefoko|kihachzefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
